modules.sql: SELECT t.account_id, COALESCE(a.customer_id, 0) AS customer_id, SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Debit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS debit_total, SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Credit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS credit_total, SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Credit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Debit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS net_movement, strftime('%m/%d/%Y', MIN(t.ifw_effective_date)) AS ifw_effective_date FROM transactions t INNER JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.account_id GROUP BY t.account_id, a.customer_id
